revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from ambiguous term/demo
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]]
  |from=an ambiguous page title
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated.  Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from ambiguous term/demo
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]]
  |from=an ambiguous page title
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated.  Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term/demo |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]] |from=an ambiguous page title |to=a disambiguation page |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from ambiguous term/demo
  |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]]
  |from=an ambiguous page title
  |to=a disambiguation page
  |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated.  Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead.
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term/demo |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]] |from=an ambiguous page title |to=a disambiguation page |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term/demo |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]] |from=an ambiguous page title |to=a disambiguation page |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term/demo |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]] |from=an ambiguous page title |to=a disambiguation page |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from ambiguous term/demo |name=[[:Category:Redirects from ambiguous pages|From an ambiguous term]] |from=an ambiguous page title |to=a disambiguation page |info=These redirects are pointed to by links that should always be disambiguated. Therefore, this template should ''never'' appear on a page that has "(disambiguation)" in its title – in that case use {{tl|R to disambiguation page}} instead. }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
